rationale: Review 1 identifies two additional grounded placement problems visible in the diff — foundational classes (`AffineAlgGroup`, `AlgPoints`) buried in a reductive-named file, and `IsUnipotent` (unipotent-layer material) mixed into a reductive file — plus the same directory-path deviation Review 2 catches; acting on it produces a properly layered module structure. Review 2's second finding is an import-weight concern, not a placement issue, so it contributes nothing extra to the placement rubric.
